inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Social Media Pack ($14.95/yr + 20% of platform ad revenue)
Get notified & paid when your music is used in content on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook. We automatically detect matches and pay you ad revenue from videos that use your music.

Your music will be added to:

YouTube's Content ID, Creator Music, and Shorts music libraries.
TikTok's music ID recognition service.
Instagram monetization with Meta Rights Manager.
Facebook's recognition service using Meta Rights Manager.

Learn more about monetizing your music on social media.

inputs.name: compoundBandName
inputs.label:
Collaboration: Paul McCartney and Stevie Wonder

This album will appear on Paul McCartney's iTunes page, and also Stevie Wonder's.
It will also appear if someone does a search for "Paul McCartney and Stevie Wonder"
Even if either/both of the collaborators don't yet have anything else in iTunes, you should still choose this.

inputs.name: compoundBandName
inputs.label:
Band name: Simon and Garfunkel or Huey Lewis and the News

"Simon" is not a standalone artist (when solo, he uses "Paul Simon"). So "Simon and Garfunkel" is treated as a band name.
"The News" is not a standalone band (and presumably never will be). So "Huey Lewis and the News" is a band name.

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Leave a Legacy ($49 one-time fee, nonrecurring)
DistroKid will never delete this album, even if you cancel your account or your credit card is declined. You can always choose to delete it any time—or not. You will continue to accrue all royalties, as normal. Protect your music and leave a legacy for future generations.

inputs.name: store
inputs.label:
Discovery Pack ($1.98/yr)
Add this album to the global databases that people use to match music and artist information. Only 99-cents per track. Includes:
Song recognition in millions of automobiles (via Gracenote)
Registration with SoundScan (used for Billboard charts)
Artist, track and album credits officially listed and linked in Jaxsta
Audio fingerprinting for rights protection with ACRCloud

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Store Maximizer ($7.95/yr)
DistroKid will automatically deliver this album to new online stores and streaming services as we add them. Which is often. We'll give you notice each time we add the album to a new service.

inputs.name: store
inputs.label:
Audiomack (free)
DistroKid will upload your release to Audiomack.

inputs.name: extras
extras
inputs.label:
Cover Song Licensing ( $12/yr x 0)
DistroKid will make your cover songs legal. We'll secure a license and automatically pay songwriters on your behalf.

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
DistroVid Music Video Distribution ($8.25/mo, billed annually at $99)
Unlimited music video distribution to Spotify, Apple, Tidal, Boomplay, VEVO while keeping 100% of your earnings! Learn more about DistroVid here.

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Loudness Normalization ($2.99 one-time fee x2, nonrecurring)
Optimizes audio level for streaming services per Spotify's recommendation (-14dB integrated LUFS & -1dB true peak maximum). This sets the volume of your track to an optimal level, and reduces or eliminates distortion & clipping during streaming services' transcoding process—without changing the sound or dynamic range of your music. If your album is already loud enough (> -14dB LUFS), this optimization will be skipped and you won't be charged.

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Dolby Atmos/Spatial audio ($26.99 x 0 one-time fee, nonrecurring)
Designates this release as Dolby Atmos with Spatial Audio on supported devices & streaming services including Apple Music, Tidal and Amazon. It's okay if you're unsure; we'll check your audio and if it isn't valid Dolby Atmos, you won't be charged.

inputs.name: extras
inputs.label:
Social Media Pack ($14.95/yr + 20% of platform ad revenue)
Get notified & paid when your music is used in content on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook. We automatically detect matches and pay you ad revenue from videos that use your music.
